speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se long-running suppression aur burden ka duration reflect karna.
text: Kaafi waqt se tum yeh sab andar daba kar hi chal rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Roz sir jhuka kar sunta hoon. Bolne ka mann hota hai par rok leta hoon.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bhai ki fasal barbaad hai aur EMI ruki hui hai. Main izzat bhi nahi khona chahta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se family survival aur honor-preservation intent mirror karna.
text: Tum apni hurt side pe rakhkar bhi ghar ka bojh aur izzat dono sambhalne mein लगे ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par andar se bahut chhota mehsoos hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Single focused question se core pain identify karna.
text: Sabse zyada kya chubhta hai: public mazaak, ghar ki zimmedari, ya parvarish par sawal ka darr?

speaker: Seeker
text: Parvarish par sawal wala darr sabse zyada hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se social judgment fear mirror karna.
text: Tumhe lagta hai ek palat jawab se log tumhari poori parvarish ko galat thehra denge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bol ke thoda halka lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relational-preservation context mein trapped/helpless emotion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum phanse hue aur majboor feel kar rahe ho - self-respect bachani hai, par ghar aur izzat ke liye khud ko rokna pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul majboori jaisi hi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Hindi-belt izzat/EMI reality se validate karke worth separate karna.
text: Jab EMI, fasal ka nuksaan aur izzat ka pressure saath ho, aisa feel karna bilkul samajhne layak hai. Isse tumhari keemat kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Saans ab theek lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Workplace power humiliation ko structural frame dena.
text: Kai offices mein public taane power ka pattern hote hain; yeh tumhari asli capacity ka final sach nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab kya karoon aaj ke liye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Once-only systemic anecdote se isolation kam karna.
text: Family-pressure wali jobs mein yeh chup rehna bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, par log bolte nahi kyunki izzat aur parvarish ki baat beech mein hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, koi simple raasta do.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness ke baad 3 short low-load options dena.
text: Teen chhote options: (1) 5 min paani + slow walk. (2) 7 min factual note likho jo office mein hua. (3) 5 min EMI due list check.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main note aur EMI list wala kar leta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen suggestion ko one-time step-by-step execute karwana.
text: Pehle notes kholo. Phir 3 lines likho: kya bola gaya, tumne kya response diya, kal ka pehla calm step kya hoga. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done. Thoda stable feel ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro progress validate karke agency reinforce karna.
text: Tumne heavy shame ke beech bhi control wapas liya, yeh strong step hai.

text: Kaafi time se tum yeh akelapan aur pressure saath mein le kar chal rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Har baar 'Ji Sir' bolte hue andar se toot jata hoon. Lagta hai main khud ki nazaron mein gir raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared consequence - job and family honor collapse - mirror karna.
text: Tumhe lag raha hai agar tumne ek baar bhi palat ke bola toh job, ghar ka balance aur shaan sab hil jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kabhi lagta hai yeh gulamiyat jaisi life ho gayi. Fasal barbaad hone ke baad options bhi kam hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se duty-to-family and survival frame mirror karna.
text: Tum apna pain daba kar bhi khandaan ki shaan aur daily survival ko pehle rakh rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Andar se bilkul khali feel hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Single focused question se core despair source identify karna.
text: Sabse zyada kya tod raha hai: public humiliation, akelapan, ya ghar ke liye sab sehna?

speaker: Seeker
text: Public humiliation aur akelapan dono. Koi sunne wala nahi hota.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se social isolation plus shame impact mirror karna.
text: Tumhe lagta hai yeh sirf insult nahi, balki akela chhod dene jaisa bhi lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bolne se halka laga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relational-preservation context mein trapped/helpless emotion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum phanse hue aur be-sahara feel kar rahe ho - self-respect bachani hai, par family aur survival ke liye khud ko daba kar chalna pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul phans gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 + migrant isolation reality se validate karke worth separate karna.
text: Jab urban migrant akelapan, fasal ka nuksaan aur job pressure saath ho, aisa feel karna bilkul samajhne layak hai. Isse tumhari keemat kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Saans thodi theek lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Workplace humiliation ko structural power behavior ke roop mein frame karna.
text: Kai workplaces mein public humiliation power imbalance ka pattern hota hai; yeh tumhari asli capability ka seedha measure nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon aaj ke liye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Once-only shared social pattern se isolation kam karna.
text: Urban migrant pressure ke saath jobs mein aisa chup rehna bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, par log bolte nahi kyunki ghar ki shaan aur rozi-roti ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, koi simple raasta do.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness ke baad 3 short low-obligation options dena.
text: Teen short options: (1) 5 min paani + slow breathing. (2) 7 min factual meeting log. (3) 5 min ek trusted contact ko simple check-in message.

speaker: Seeker
text: Meeting log aur check-in message karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen step ko one-time sequence mein execute karwana.
text: Pehle notes kholo. 3 lines likho: kya bola gaya, tumne kya response diya, kal ka pehla steady step kya hoga. Phir ek short check-in text bhej do. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, thoda stable feel ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro stability regain ko validate karna.
text: Bahut achha, tumne despair ke beech bhi practical control wapas liya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal ka mini plan de do.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Next-day low-overload mini structure dena.
text: Kal mini plan: (1) start pe 2 priority tasks fix karo. (2) sharp tone aaye toh bolo: "Ji, current task complete karke update deta hoon." (3) shaam ko 5 min backup job note mein 1 entry add.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh useful lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Tiny template देकर execution friction kam karna.
text: Template use karo: "Role - source - next step". Ek line enough hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Easy lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Tiny backup planning ko uncertainty reducer ke roop mein normalise karna.
text: Heavy uncertainty mein tiny backup planning nervous system ko certainty deti hai aur pressure halka karti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab pehle se better hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progress aur dignity reinforce karna.
text: Tumne heavy pressure ke beech bhi dignity ke saath apna direction wapas liya, yeh meaningful recovery hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, himmat aa rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night close ke 2 tiny stabilizers dena.
text: Sone se pehle do anchors: kal ka first task note top pe pin karo aur paani ki bottle paas rakho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, dono set kar diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se beginning-to-now shift mirror karna.
text: Jahan tum full despair loop mein the, wahan se ab tumne stable pace build kar liya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj ke liye itna kaafi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final worth-outcome separation reassure karna.
text: Tumne bohot pressure ke beech bhi sambhalne wale kadam liye. Aaj ka apmaan tumhari poori keemat ka final sach nahi.
